name: hook-pack
description: Native Claude Code hook foundation with modular enablement controls.

enabled_hooks.title: Enabled hook IDs
enabled_hooks.description: Comma-separated hook IDs to enable for this plugin. Leave empty to use default enablement rules.

disabled_hooks.title: Disabled hook IDs
disabled_hooks.description: Comma-separated hook IDs to disable for this plugin. Disabled IDs always win over enabled IDs.

enable_all_hooks_by_default.title: Enable all hooks by default
enable_all_hooks_by_default.description: When true, every implemented hook defaults to enabled unless listed in disabled_hooks.
